productDisplayName: Nike Women Air Dictate 2 MSL White Sports Shoes
description: With the nike Air Dictate MSL shoe you can train with comfort and style. Gearing up for any sport requires a demanding aerobic regimen. The nike Air Dictate MSL wraps the foot in soft comfort with an innersleeve, while its low profile ensures a lightweight, low-to-the-ground feel. A mesh upper circulates air with every step to keep the foot cool on hot days, while a modern, streamlined silhouette is marked with Nike branding that make a statement. UpperBreathable sandwich mesh upper with synthetic overlays for breathability and supportNo-sew overlays in the midfoot offers a secure, irritation-free feelExtra heel support to lock the backfoot in place and protect it from injuriesPadded lining for a comfortable step in feelPadded tongue and collar for added comfortLace-ups for a snug Fit and to lock the foot in placeMesh tongue for breathabilitySwoosh logo on the sides to create a style statementMidsoleAir cushioning unit in the pylon midsole guarantees a smooth and responsive rideMedial and lateral Air-Sole midsole units deliver supreme cushioningOutsoleBRS 1000 durable rubber outsole for long-lasting wearWaffle-pattern grip for excellent tractionHeel crash pad helps reduce impacting shock and set the foot up for a smooth transitionTPU shank adds extra supportShoe careRemove dust and dirt with a damp, clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight or machine wash
